name: seurat-tools
description: Seurat Group consulting toolkit — meeting notes, survey test plans, and survey doc generation
author: Seurat Group

skills.name: meeting-notes
skills.description: Transform call transcripts into polished Seurat meeting notes (.docx)

skills.name: survey-mapper
skills.description: Read a survey document and produce a structured Survey Map (.md)

skills.name: test-path-generator
skills.description: Generate a single test path from a Survey Map + matrix row (.txt)

skills.name: test-plan-assembler
skills.description: Assemble all test paths into a complete Survey Test Plan (.docx)

skills.name: survey-wireframe-to-doc
skills.description: Convert a survey wireframe into a programmer-ready survey document (.docx)

commands.name: meeting-notes
commands.description: Clean meeting notes from a transcript

commands.name: survey-doc
commands.description: Convert wireframe to programmer-ready survey doc

commands.name: test-plan
commands.description: Run full survey test plan pipeline
